issue: python command resolves to Windows Store shim
cause: The system python.exe path reports version 0.0.0.0 and does not run normally
mitigation: Use bundled runtime from Codex workspace dependencies
reusable_rule: Prefer the bundled Python executable when running tools in this workspace

issue: complex hair and lace may leave chroma residue
cause: Long dark hair lace and fine accessories have many antialiased edges
mitigation: Generate with generous padding and flat #ff00ff background then validate alpha corners
reusable_rule: Do not accept transparent assets before visual edge inspection

issue: generated images should not contain final Chinese text
cause: Image models can distort dense text and labels
mitigation: Let HTML render all labels captions borders and long text
reusable_rule: Keep image prompts textless unless a small visual mark is explicitly needed

issue: assets can be saved into the wrong sister folder when agents work in parallel
cause: The two characters share similar asset types and filenames
mitigation: Validate every item path starts with assets/characters/<character>/

issue: preflight and verify currently create separate timestamped harness run folders
cause: Harness CLI assigns a fresh timestamp per subcommand instead of sharing a run id
mitigation: Copy preflight evidence into the verify run before bundling for now and plan a shared run-id flow in the CLI
reusable_rule: Give harness subcommands an explicit shared run identifier before scaling CI artifacts

issue: asset grids showed small horizontal overflow
cause: Default figure margins added extra width inside CSS grid
mitigation: Reset figure margin to zero in shared CSS
reusable_rule: Always reset native figure margins before using figure as grid tile

issue: lazy images looked broken in automated mobile checks
cause: Offscreen loading=lazy images had naturalWidth 0 before scroll reached them
mitigation: Remove lazy loading from generated local showcase pages for this phase
reusable_rule: Prefer eager loading while pages are used as visual QA boards

issue: some first-pass crops are skewed or missing context
cause: Automatic crop coordinates were made from dense full-sheet layouts and are working references
mitigation: Use the full source_sheet image as secondary reference when generation fails; only update crop_manifest after repeated failure
reusable_rule: Crops are handles and the full sheet is the visual authority

issue: planned transparent outputs were flagged as broken links
cause: HTML and registry pages intentionally link future PNG targets before generation
mitigation: Teach audit and reader tools to classify missing generated transparent outputs as planned
reusable_rule: Planned asset paths are valid structure and should be audited for boundary and naming rather than existence

issue: anchor-scoped HTML reading can hide structure when pages lack explicit section ids or the wrong anchor is requested
cause: Rendered documentation pages may be visually organized without stable ids for targeted reads
mitigation: Add stable section ids on generated pages and make the reader report anchor status plus grouped link maps
reusable_rule: Generated HTML meant for agent navigation should expose stable section ids for low-token reading

issue: playwright.exe is installed outside PATH when using bundled Python
cause: Workspace tools rely on the bundled runtime instead of a system Python installation
mitigation: Call Playwright through the bundled python executable or repo script instead of assuming PATH is configured
reusable_rule: Prefer explicit bundled-runtime commands in docs and smoke-check automation

issue: current index looks shorter than first version
cause: The current index became a lightweight showcase and no longer duplicates all first-version paragraphs
mitigation: Keep the first full guide under docs and expose it through content_map links
reusable_rule: Do not treat a shorter generated index as content deletion before checking docs/content_map.md

issue: old archive content is hard to find from a single showcase page
cause: Aesthetic showcase pages cannot carry dense story prompt and workflow material
mitigation: Use project_data/knowledge_base.json to generate knowledge pages that link back to old archive anchors
reusable_rule: Separate display pages from knowledge pages and keep source anchors visible

issue: large HTML pages waste context and mix content with decoration
cause: Raw generated HTML includes navigation CSS image tags and layout scaffolding
mitigation: Use project-doc-governance read_html_doc.py to inspect one page or anchor with image placeholders first
reusable_rule: Read HTML progressively and open real images only when visual inspection is required

issue: old #navigation was only an archive anchor not a structured page
cause: Knowledge index linked content pages but did not explain reading routes or module mapping
mitigation: Add knowledge/navigation.html as the first knowledge page and map #overview/#navigation to it
reusable_rule: Give navigation its own generated page before deep content pages
